description: Verifiable backup of 120 legacy RAG documents before deterministic versioned migration

indexes.name: documents_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX documents_pkey ON public.documents USING btree (id)

indexes.name: documents_embedding_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX documents_embedding_idx ON public.documents USING hnsw (embedding extensions.vector_ip_ops)

indexes.name: documents_fts_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX documents_fts_idx ON public.documents USING gin (fts)

functions.name: hybrid_search
functions.arguments: query_text text, query_embedding vector, match_count integer, full_text_weight double precision, semantic_weight double precision, rrf_k integer

functions.name: match_documents
functions.arguments: query_embedding vector, match_threshold double precision, match_count integer
